reviews.review_msg: Kindof an odd dude. Lectures are very theoretical and leave you with more questions than answers. Required us to buy the physical textbook to avoid AI use? then let us use the FREE DIGITAL version in class anyway. Also participation is worth 25% of your grade. Short turnaround for assignments too.

Ross is a super engaging lecturer and all around great guy. Landscape arch ended up being one of my favourite courses in my degree even though I'm not very interested in environmental arch. He has a lot of interesting ideas, you'll get a lot out of his courses if you engage with the readings and lectures and speak up in class.
Average prof at best. No matter how hard you work if you're not an Archaeology major you can never get even the least of As.

One of the best prof's I've taken in 6 years of college/university. Very understanding of students having other classes and will adjust his due dates if the class asks. Has weekly readings that has small in class activities worth a decent amount of your mark but they're pretty easy! Super funny, engaging and passionate about his work.
